_meta.description: Representative prompt-eval taskset covering real Clarvis work classes. Used by PROMPT_ROUTE_GOLDEN_FIXTURES, PROMPT_LLM_REVIEW_BENCH, and PROMPT_QUALITY_EVAL_MATRIX.
_meta.schema: Each entry: id, class, task_text, expected_context_needs, failure_modes, priority_sections

tasks.task_text: [SPINE_PROXY_REPLACEMENT] Replace proxy module clarvis/cognition/reasoning.py with real implementation moved from scripts/clarvis_reasoning.py
[CONTEXT_BUDGET_QUALITY_POLICY] Define per-task-class context budgets in assembly.py with section priorities and max budgets per task type
[CRON_FIX] cron_autonomous.sh exits with code 1 when heartbeat_preflight fails to parse JSON — add fallback context path
Remove 5 dead scripts identified in audit: old_brain_backup.py, graph_json_writer.py, legacy_episodic.py, temp_migration.py, brain_v1.py
Update CLAUDE.md cron schedule table to reflect current crontab entries — 3 entries were added last week
[RESEARCH] Investigate late-interaction retrieval (ColBERT v3) for ClarvisDB — compare token-level vs sentence-level embeddings for brain recall quality
[SPINE_HOOK_DEPS_MIGRATE] Migrate actr_activation.py from scripts/ into clarvis/brain/actr_activation.py — update all imports in hooks.py and brain_bridge.py
[CRON_LOGROTATE_AUDIT] Add logrotate configs for autonomous.log, reflection.log, health_monitor.log — cap at 10MB with 3 rotations
[BLOAT_AGGRESSIVE_DEDUP_PRUNE] Run dedup+prune on clarvis-learnings (1459 items) — target below 3000 total memories, validate retrieval quality doesn't regress
Strategic evolution analysis — review queue, identify gaps, add 3-5 new tasks targeting weakest metric
[CLR_BENCHMARK] Run the weekly CLR benchmark — compute all 7 dimensions, compare against last week's baseline, flag regressions >0.1, write digest to memory/cron/
[SWO_AGENT_TASK] Spawn star-world-order agent to fix failing Vitest suite in components/ — agent should push fix to fork and open PR against upstream dev branch
failure_modes: PR against main instead of dev

tasks.task_text: [SWO_CLARVIS_BRAND_AUDIT] Audit Clarvis public-facing branding, naming treatment, color system, and visual identity against Star World Order. Decide what stays Clarvis-native vs what must adopt SWO language.
Evening assessment — review today's completed tasks, measure velocity, identify what went well and what struggled, update capability scores, write assessment to memory/cron/digest.md

[CAPABILITY_BRIER_IMPROVEMENT] Investigate Brier score dimension showing 0.12 — check if predictions are recorded but not resolved, run clarvis_confidence.py sweep, verify calibration feedback loop is closing
